case_title: DANIEL SCHER VS. HORNEFF WADDLE CORP.

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,006.42 FILED BY HORNEFF WADDLE CORP. DBA PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SCHER, DANIEL DBA SUGAR PLUM PROPERTIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-17-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHER, DANIEL DBA SUGAR PLUM PROPERTIES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HORNEFF WADDLE CORP. DBA PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO PLAINTIFF SCHER, DANIEL DBA SUGAR PLUM PROPERTIES
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT SCHER, DANIEL DBA SUGAR PLUM PROPERTIES MAILED TO RESPONDENT HORNEFF WADDLE CORP. DBA PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT HORNEFF WADDLE CORP. DBA PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS TAKE NOTHING FROM APPELLANT SCHER, DANIEL DBA SUGAR PLUM PROPERTIES CROSS CLAIM JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF HORNEFF WADDLE CORP AND AGAINST DANIEL SCHER AS FOLLOWS: $943.43 PRINCIPAL, $0 ATTORNEY FEES, $109.50 COSTS, $0 INTEREST, $0 SPECIFY, $1,052.93 TOTAL. TERMS/OTHER ORDERS 943.43 = (2,995 X 6 X 0.0525). JUDGMENT IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO DEFENDANT SEEKING AMOUNTS NOT STATED IN DEFENDANT'S CLAIM FILED ON JANUARY 20, 2011. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
